mnemonics: RAPID: Reputation, Authentication, Protection, Isolation, Detection
keyPoints: Reputation systems track entity trustworthiness based on past behavior
Authentication verifies entity identities before granting access
Protection mechanisms safeguard data integrity and confidentiality
Isolation contains potential breaches to minimize damage
Detection systems identify and alert on suspicious activities
commonMistakes: Confusing reputation with authentication (reputation tracks behavior, authentication verifies identity)
Assuming isolation alone provides complete security (needs combined approach)
Overlooking the importance of continuous monitoring in detection systems
